headline: No notable events detected across 1 URL.
runSummary: No notable events detected for https://notion.so in the queried date range.

coverage.note: 1 gap of 90+ days detected. Largest: 156 days from 2016-10-26 to 2017-03-31.

anomalies.note: HTTP 522 appeared once — possible auth wall, outage, or block.

benchmarks.note: Volatility 0.56 — https://notion.so changes more often than the typical competitor page.

evidence.archiveSource: Internet Archive Wayback Machine — CDX API
evidence.note: Run the same actor with the same parameters and you will get the same reproducibleQueryHash. The hash plus retrievalTimestamp gives a chain-of-custody anchor for legal / compliance use cases. Note: the underlying CDX index can grow over time as the Internet Archive captures new snapshots.
